note: The official Handbook publishes two paths. The Professional Option requires 64 units of Core Courses and 12 units from the explicit Major Elective pool; the Liberal Studies Option requires 46 units of Core Courses, 6 units from two closed Required Elective pools (one 3-unit course from each pool), and 9 units from the explicit Major Elective pool. Both options additionally require FILM4878 and FILM4879 for the 6-unit Honours Project. Courses repeated across option cores, required-elective pools and the major-elective pool are stored once with every official role retained. FILM3006, FILM3016, FILM3076, FILM4035 and FILM4065 are available as Major Electives only for the Liberal Studies Option. The Programme table assigns FILM4016 Internship 3 units while the linked individual course page assigns it 0 unit; the Programme-specific 3-unit value is retained here and the official conflict is flagged for manual confirmation. The individual course pages supply the corrected titles 'Fundamentals in Computer Graphics' for FILM2035 and 'Dolby Atmos Production' for FILM4106. BAGE1005 and BAGE2005 are retained because the Programme explicitly includes them in its Major Elective pool and notes that they are offered by BAGE. University Language, General Education and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the official requirement table does not publish course timing.
